description:
# Safety Check-in & Location Sharing

Safety-focused check-in system with automated check-ins, emergency contacts, real-time location sharing with trusted contacts, check-in scheduling, and missed check-in alerts. Includes emergency SOS functionality and status updates.

## Rationale
Addresses critical user pain point: 'Safety concerns when traveling solo without trusted contacts knowing your location.' Also addresses location sharing privacy concerns (pain-7-1, pain-7-2) by implementing privacy-first approach. This is a key differentiator from general travel apps.

## User Stories
- As a solo traveler, I want to share my location with trusted contacts so that someone knows where I am in case of emergency
- As a safety-conscious user, I want automated check-ins so that my contacts are alerted if I don't report in safely
- As a traveler, I want an emergency SOS button so that I can quickly get help if needed
- As a privacy-conscious user, I want to control exactly who sees my location and when

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Users can designate trusted contacts from their phone or app community
- [ ] Users can schedule automatic check-ins at specific times or locations
- [ ] Trusted contacts receive location updates and status notifications
- [ ] Missed check-ins trigger alerts to trusted contacts with last known location
- [ ] Emergency SOS button shares real-time location with all trusted contacts
- [ ] Users can manually update their status (safe, need help, emergency)
- [ ] Location sharing is granular - users control what, when, and with whom
- [ ] Battery-efficient location tracking prevents excessive drain

subtasks.description: Create TrustedContact, CheckIn, LocationUpdate, SafetyAlert, and SafetyStatus entities

subtasks.title: Create use cases for location sharing

subtasks.title: Create use cases for emergency SOS

phases.description: Implement datasources and repositories with local storage and API integration

subtasks.title: Create safety exceptions
subtasks.description: Define safety-specific exceptions for error handling

subtasks.title: Implement local data source
subtasks.description: Create SafetyLocalDataSource for caching safety data using SharedPreferences

subtasks.title: Implement remote data source
subtasks.description: Create SafetyRemoteDataSource for API communication

subtasks.title: Implement repository
subtasks.description: Create SafetyRepositoryImpl implementing the repository interface

subtasks.title: Add GraphQL mutations and queries
subtasks.description: Define GraphQL operations for safety features

phases.title: Phase 3: Location Services & Background Tasks
phases.description: Implement location tracking, battery-efficient monitoring, and background check-ins

subtasks.title: Create location service
subtasks.description: Implement LocationService for battery-efficient location tracking using geolocator

subtasks.title: Create background check-in service
subtasks.description: Implement background service using workmanager for scheduled check-ins

subtasks.title: Create notification service
subtasks.description: Implement notification service for check-in reminders and alerts
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive notification service with interface and implementation. Supports check-in reminders, missed check-in alerts, emergency SOS notifications, safety status updates, and location sharing notifications. Uses flutter_local_notifications with timezone support. Configured notification channels for Android. Added timezone package dependency. Includes permission handling, scheduled notifications, and proper error handling. Follows existing service patterns.

subtasks.title: Implement missed check-in detector
subtasks.description: Create service to detect missed check-ins and trigger alerts
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive missed check-in detector service with interface and implementation. Detects check-ins that have passed their deadline (with configurable grace period) and triggers safety alerts to trusted contacts. Includes last known location in alerts (with age validation), filters contacts by notification preferences, and sends local notifications to users. Features include status tracking, batch processing of missed check-ins, configurable detection parameters, and proper error handling. Also created SafetyRepository provider to support dependency injection. Follows existing service and infrastructure patterns.

subtasks.title: Configure platform-specific settings
subtasks.description: Configure Android and iOS for background location and notifications
subtasks.notes: Configured Android and iOS platforms for background location and notifications. Android: Added location permissions (foreground and background), notification permissions (POST_NOTIFICATIONS for Android 13+), foreground service permissions, and workmanager background task permissions. Configured SystemForegroundService with location type. Updated MainActivity.kt to register WorkManagerPlugin. iOS: Added NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription and NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription with clear user-facing descriptions. Configured UIBackgroundModes for location, background-processing, and remote-notification. These configurations enable battery-efficient location tracking, background check-in monitoring, emergency SOS functionality, and safety status updates with trusted contacts.

phases.title: Phase 4: State Management & Providers
phases.description: Implement Riverpod providers and state management for safety features

subtasks.title: Create safety states
subtasks.description: Define state classes for trusted contacts, check-ins, location sharing, and SOS
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive state classes using Equatable pattern. SafetyState manages overall safety status, alerts, and emergency information. TrustedContactsState handles contacts list with CRUD operation flags. CheckInState manages check-ins and scheduled check-ins with due-soon tracking. LocationSharingState manages active location shares and updates. All states include isLoading, isProcessing flags, error handling, copyWith methods, and computed getters for derived values. Follows ProfileState pattern from existing codebase.

subtasks.title: Create safety notifiers
subtasks.description: Implement Riverpod notifiers for safety features
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive Riverpod notifiers following ProfileNotifier pattern. TrustedContactsNotifier manages CRUD operations for trusted contacts with preference management. CheckInNotifier handles creating, completing, scheduling, and cancelling check-ins. LocationSharingNotifier manages location sharing with support for emergency sharing. SafetyNotifier oversees overall safety state with SOS functionality, status updates, and safety alerts management. All notifiers include proper error handling, loading states, and state updates using copyWith pattern.

subtasks.title: Create safety providers
subtasks.description: Define Riverpod providers for safety feature injection
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive safety providers file with all required providers. Added service providers (LocationService, NotificationService, BackgroundCheckInService, MissedCheckInDetector). Added use case providers for all safety domain operations (14 providers total). Created notifier providers for state management (TrustedContactsNotifier, CheckInNotifier, LocationSharingNotifier, SafetyNotifier). Added state providers for accessing feature states. Added selector providers for convenient access to common state properties (40+ selectors). Follows existing Riverpod patterns from auth and profile features. Uses @riverpod annotations for services (code generation) and classic Provider pattern for notifiers and state (matching presentation layer patterns). Includes proper resource disposal with ref.onDispose() for all services and notifiers.

phases.title: Phase 5: UI Implementation - Trusted Contacts
phases.description: Build screens and widgets for managing trusted contacts

subtasks.title: Create trusted contacts list screen
subtasks.description: Build screen to display and manage trusted contacts
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive trusted contacts list screen with full CRUD functionality. Features: displays list of trusted contacts with avatar, name, phone, source, and permission chips; shows location sharing and emergency alerts status indicators; loading, empty, and error states; pull-to-refresh; info dialog explaining trusted contacts and permission levels; popup menu for edit, toggle location sharing, toggle emergency alerts, and delete actions; contact details bottom sheet showing all contact information; confirmation dialog for delete; proper state management using Riverpod notifiers; follows existing screen patterns from profile feature.

subtasks.title: Create add/edit trusted contact screen
subtasks.description: Build screen for adding and editing trusted contacts
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive AddEditTrustedContactScreen with form for adding/editing contacts. Supports all TrustedContact fields: name, phone, email, source (phone/community), permission levels (emergencyOnly/checkIns/fullAccess), location sharing toggle, emergency alerts toggle, check-in notifications toggle, and notes. Includes form validation, permission level descriptions, loading states, and proper error handling. Integrated with TrustedContactsNotifier for state management. Fixed receivesCheckIns field name bug in TrustedContactsNotifier. Updated TrustedContactsScreen navigation to use new screen. Follows existing patterns from profile feature.

subtasks.title: Create contact picker widget
subtasks.description: Build widget for selecting contacts from phone or community
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive ContactPickerWidget with tabbed interface for selecting contacts from phone or community. Phone Contacts tab: uses flutter_contacts package to fetch and display device contacts with search functionality, handles contact permissions gracefully, shows loading and error states, filters contacts with phone numbers only, sorts by name. Community tab: shows placeholder for future community member selection. Widget uses ContactSelectedCallback typedef for returning selected contact data (name, phone, email). Integrated with AddEditTrustedContactScreen with 'Select from Phone Contacts' button that auto-fills form fields. Added flutter_contacts dependency to pubspec.yaml. Follows existing widget patterns with proper state management, error handling, and Material Design UI.

subtasks.title: Create trusted contact card widget
subtasks.description: Build widget for displaying individual trusted contact info
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive TrustedContactCard widget for displaying individual trusted contact information. Features: displays avatar with initials, name, and phone number; shows permission level chip with color coding (emergencyOnly/checkIns/fullAccess); shows contact source chip (phone/community); displays status indicators for location sharing and emergency alerts with tooltips; configurable properties (onTap callback, showStatusIndicators, showSourceChip, isCompact); supports both full and compact display modes; follows existing widget patterns from ProfileAvatar and ContactPickerWidget; uses proper Material Design theming and styling; provides a reusable component for displaying trusted contacts in lists or grids with optional tap handling for navigation.

phases.title: Phase 6: UI Implementation - Check-ins
phases.description: Build screens and widgets for check-in functionality

subtasks.title: Create check-in home screen
subtasks.description: Build main check-in screen showing active and upcoming check-ins
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive CheckInHomeScreen with full check-in management functionality. Features include: status cards showing due soon and missed counts; prominent next check-in card; list of upcoming check-ins with detailed information; color-coded status indicators; loading, empty, and error states; check-in details bottom sheet; floating action button for new check-ins; menu for choosing manual or scheduled check-ins; info dialog explaining functionality. Follows existing screen patterns from TrustedContactsScreen. Uses ConsumerStatefulWidget pattern. Integrates with CheckInNotifier for state management. Proper state management with loading, error, and success handling. Helper widgets: _StatusCard, _CheckInDetailsSheet, _DetailRow. Formats dates/times for user display. Handles different check-in trigger types. Visual feedback for due soon and overdue check-ins.

subtasks.title: Create manual check-in screen
subtasks.description: Build screen for manual check-in with location and status
subtasks.notes: Implemented comprehensive ManualCheckInScreen with automatic location acquisition, optional status message input, safety status selector (Just Check In, I'm Safe, Need Help, Emergency), and support for both new check-ins and completing existing scheduled check-ins. Features include: high-accuracy GPS tracking with visible coordinates (lat/long/altitude), location refresh capability with loading and error states, integration with LocationService for GPS data and CheckInNotifier/SafetyNotifier for state management, proper error handling and user feedback. UI includes location card with accuracy indicator, status message text field, radio button status selector with icons, and loading/error states. Updated CheckInHomeScreen to navigate to ManualCheckInScreen (added import, connected Complete button and Manual Check-in menu option). Follows existing screen patterns from AddEditTrustedContactScreen with ConsumerStatefulWidget and proper state management. Commit: c8e6843

subtasks.title: Create schedule check-in screen
subtasks.description: Build screen for scheduling automatic check-ins
subtasks.notes: Implemented comprehensive ScheduleCheckInScreen with full scheduling functionality for automatic check-ins. Features include: trigger type selector (Scheduled Time, Location Arrival, Location Departure), date/time picker for scheduling, optional custom deadline configuration with default 1-hour deadline, location acquisition for location-based triggers with accuracy indicator, optional status message input, multi-contact selector for choosing which trusted contacts to notify, empty state handling, and proper loading/error/success states. Uses CheckInNotifier.scheduleCheckIn(), integrates with LocationService for GPS, watches trustedContactsNotifierProvider, supports optional tripId parameter. Updated CheckInHomeScreen navigation. Follows existing patterns from ManualCheckInScreen and AddEditTrustedContactScreen with ConsumerStatefulWidget pattern, proper state management, and form validation.

subtasks.title: Create check-in history screen
subtasks.description: Build screen showing check-in history

subtasks.title: Create check-in widgets
subtasks.description: Build reusable widgets for check-in UI

subtasks.description: Define navigation routes for safety screens

subtasks.description: Test use cases and entities

acceptance_criteria: Users can designate trusted contacts from their phone or app community
Users can schedule automatic check-ins at specific times or locations
Trusted contacts receive location updates and status notifications
Missed check-ins trigger alerts to trusted contacts with last known location
Emergency SOS button shares real-time location with all trusted contacts
Users can manually update their status (safe, need help, emergency)
Location sharing is granular - users control what, when, and with whom
Battery-efficient location tracking prevents excessive drain
notes: Project uses Flutter with Riverpod for state management
Existing dependencies include geolocator, google_maps_flutter, flutter_map, workmanager, flutter_local_notifications
Follows clean architecture pattern: domain -> data -> infrastructure -> presentation
Requires platform-specific configuration for Android and iOS
